content: BLE beacons provide indoor localization with 1-3m accuracy using RSSI signal strength

name: Hot/Cold Finder Algorithm
description: Implements distance trend analysis with 5-point history, provides HOT/WARM/COLD status with directional guidance ('Keep going', 'Turn around', etc.), confidence percentage based on history size, and haptic feedback (Heavy/Medium/Light) based on proximity. Uses Kalman-filtered RSSI for stability.

name: BLE Reusable Components
description: Created ProximityIndicator (animated glow circle), SignalStrengthBar (5-segment bar), BLEDeviceCard (compact/full modes). All use Uber design tokens (#06C167, black surfaces), support haptic feedback, and are fully reusable across the app.
